GameWin.title: Game Win
GameWin.description: Represents the status (won, cancelled, etc.) of a specific baseball game.

won.description: Whether the game was won or not.

cancelled.description: Whether the game was cancelled (e.g., rainout).

updatedAt.description: The timestamp of when the status was last updated.

/game_wins/{gameId}.description: Collection storing status and outcomes for specific games.
